close_reason: Added error handling for WorkerPool.dispatch result - logs warning on failure, relies on lease expiration for retry
description:
Manager.dispatch_jobs/2 (line 132) calls WorkerPool.dispatch() but doesn't check the result. If DynamicSupervisor rejects the child (max_children exceeded), the job is silently lost.

Fix: Check dispatch result and handle :max_children error appropriately.
title: Fix unchecked dispatch result in Manager
